The '''''Shelltooth''''' was a modified [[CorelliSpace]] [[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 light freighter]] owned by the [[Quor'sav/Legends|Quor'sav]] trader [[Kal'Falnl C'ndros]]. It possessed a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. It was customized to have corridors that accommodated her 3.5 meter height, and to have a protected chamber where her clutch of eggs was kept for the year necessary for them to hatch.

{{Ship-stub}}
